'''Borz'Mat'oh''' was a philosopher of the [[Duinuogwuin/Legends|Duinuogwuin]] [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="Core" /> In [[15,500 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Borz'Mat'oh's species became embroiled in the [[Duinuogwuin Contention]], a conflict with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], but the philosopher was able to forge a peace between the Duinuogwuin and the Republic after meeting with their [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Fillorean]]. After the Contention, Borz'Mat'oh and Fillorean founded the [[University of Coruscant/Legends|University of Coruscant]] on the Republic's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], and the pair were immortalized in statues crafted from the dark [[Glass/Legends|glass]] known as [[Chalcedony/Legends|chalcedony]].<ref name="Core" />

==Behind the scenes==
Borz'Mat'oh was first mentioned in the [[2003]] sourcebook ''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'', published by [[West End Games]] for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Core" />
